message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve seafood food and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should be in the centre
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 12:45 on monday
If the booking fails how about 11:45
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on tuesday
The train should go to norwich and should leave after 11:30
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
